title: How to Play
introduction: Work out the song from a sequence of gloriously questionable drawings.

sections.heading: Study the scribbles
sections.body: Read the clue and look across every picture. Together they point towards a song title.

sections.heading: Take your best shot
sections.body: You get five different guesses. Capital letters, punctuation and accents will not trip you up.

sections.heading: Hints and surrender
sections.body: Reveal Artist gives you a free hint. Reveal Song ends the round immediately, so use it only when the doodles have defeated you.

sections.heading: Missed an issue?
sections.body: Previous Issues contains the released archive, newest first, so you can catch up whenever you like.

panels.alt: A rough drawing of a person being hit in the face.
